top.name: Infinity Loop
top.rules_text: Gain 5 charge. For the rest of this turn, charge costs are halved (round up).

bottom.name: Living Spell
bottom.rules_text: Exile a spell from your hand. Summon a Living Spell on target tile (HP = mana x5, DMG = mana x2) that casts the exiled spell on the nearest enemy each turn.

upgrades.description: Loop banks more. Living Spell is sturdier.

changes.value: Gain 6 charge. For the rest of this turn, charge costs are halved (round up).
Exile a spell. Summon a Living Spell (HP = mana x6, DMG = mana x2) that casts it on the nearest enemy each turn.

upgrades.description: Closed Loop: charge costs drop to zero this turn.

changes.value: Gain 6 charge. For the rest of this turn, charge costs are 0.

upgrades.description: Animate Spell: the construct hits harder.

changes.value: Exile a spell. Summon a Living Spell (HP = mana x6, DMG = mana x3) that casts it on the nearest enemy each turn.

upgrades.description: Recursion: also makes all spells Reaction speed this turn.

changes.value: Gain 6 charge. This turn: charge costs are 0 and all your spells gain Reaction speed.

upgrades.description: Greater Living Spell: the construct acts twice per turn.

changes.value: Exile a spell. Summon a Living Spell (HP = mana x6, DMG = mana x3) that casts it on the nearest enemy twice each turn.

upgrades.description: Eternal Loop: bank to the cap and gain a free recast.

changes.value: Gain 6 charge. This turn: charge costs 0, all spells Reaction speed. Recast your last spell for free.

upgrades.description: Avatar of Magic: a towering construct that casts both halves.

changes.value: Exile a spell. Summon a Living Spell (HP = mana x8, DMG = mana x3) that casts both halves on the nearest enemy twice each turn.
